reasoning: Initial observation suggests R1 and R2 are in series since their sum equals total_resistance. To confirm, I will increase R1.
Increasing R1 did not change the total_resistance, suggesting R1 and R2 are in parallel.
Since increasing or decreasing R1 does not change the total_resistance, R1 and R2 must be in parallel. The formula for resistors in parallel is 1/total_resistance = 1/R1 + 1/R2.
